title: OpenStack barbican
description: Configuration for the Barbican key-manager service (OpenStack-Helm barbican, release 2025.1). Only the fields here are settable on a Composition; everything else uses the chart defaults in values.yaml. Deploy all the OpenStack component blueprints into one namespace to form a complete install. The simple_crypto KEK defaults to a well-known value in the chart - override conf.barbican.simple_crypto_plugin.kek with a real 32-byte base64 key for production (the KEK must never change after secrets are stored, or they become undecryptable).
